title: galium campanulatum var. glabrum
intro: Galium campanulatum var. glabrum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the bellflower cinquefoil plant, a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium campanulatum var. glabrum include its potential to treat various ailments such as digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of teas or infusions, can be made by using the leaves and flowers of the plant, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
